case_title: MARLTON MANOR LTD. vs. CORNISH, STEVEN et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARLTON MANOR LTD. AS TO DEFENDANT CORNISH, STEVEN DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS GRANTED BY JUDGE QUIDACHAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARLTON MANOR LTD.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARLTON MANOR LTD. SERVED MAY-21-1996, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT CORNISH, STEVEN
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARLTON MANOR LTD. AS TO DEFENDANT CORNISH, STEVEN
DECLARATION OF LOST OR UNAVAILABLE ORIGINAL WRITTEN CONTRACT/LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARLTON MANOR LTD.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CORNISH, STEVEN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 240 JONES ST #404, LEASE FORFEITED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CORNISH, STEVEN
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT CORNISH, STEVEN

EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND, DECLARATION, ORDER GRANTED BY JUDGE QUIDACHAY #2, AND TO DISMISS ACTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARLTON MANOR LTD. DEFAULT OF JUN-10-1996 SET ASIDE, JUDGMENT OF JUN-10-1996 SET ASIDE
